sample_rules: Include synthetic renters with one pre-exposure and one eligible post-exposure election observation.
Apply overlap restriction before outcome estimation.
measure_construction: exposed = threshold transition under charter revision 1
model_specifications: Weighted risk-difference estimator with predeclared covariates
Associational label enforced because audit downgraded the branch
uncertainty_strategy: Bootstrap synthetic households with pinned seed and report interval coverage in benchmark assertions.
missing_data_strategy: Run complete-case primary fixture and predeclared inverse-probability sensitivity fixture.
kill_rules: Stop if effective sample size falls below fixture threshold.
Stop if any output requests a causal status above the audit ceiling.
amendment_policy: Any change after lock creates a new revision, records rationale and cannot overwrite the locked object.
